title: Congregate Meals/Nutrition Sites * Chronic/Severe Mental Illness - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Food > Congregate Meals/Nutrition Sites * Chronic/Severe Mental Illness 1 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Refine Results - Select - No Filter Chronic/Severe Mental Illness Native American Community Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF FOLKTIME INC FOLKTIME Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Member-run social program and drop-in center for adults with a mental health diagnosis. Programs include craft projects, games, guest speakers, and discussions on current topics of interest. Hot lunches prepared and shared on site. 4837 NE Couch Street Portland, OR 97213 Eligibility: Age 18 and older individuals who identify as having lived experience with mental health and substance use challenges. Potential attendees should be committed to recovery and participation in a positive community and have no recent or ongoing history of violence. Hours: Monday/Wednesday/Thursday 10am-2pm; meals served at noon Email (503) 238-6428 Get Directions Visit Website More Details FOLKTIME INC FOLKTIME
